title: Engraved
description: A mod centered about a new material called engraveium which comes with a cool new weapon and feature.
body:
# **Engraved:**
Engraved is a mod about collecting items to craft a new weapon with, that has powerfull abilities.

## **Obtaining**
**Items:**
- Engravium Greatsword is crafted with Engravium Ingots and you can slot in one of four Spirit Stones to give it different abilities.
- Engravium Ingots are crafted with Engravium Shards.
- Engravium Shards can be found in ancient citys, or grown by using a shard ontop of ancient debris (1/3 chance to get 2 shards on the last growth stage)

**Spirit Stones:**
- Empty Spirit Stone: Obtained by killing an Evoker with the Engravium Greatsword (has a 50% chance).
- Green Spirit Stone: Is obtained by killing a charged creeper with an Empty Spirit Stone in the ofhand.
- Blue Spirit Stone: Crafted with Diamond Blocks and an Empty Spirit Stone.
- Orange Spirit Stone: Riptide through fire with an Empty Spirit Stone on the offhand.
- Pink Spirit Stone: Rightclick a beacon with an Empty Spirit Stone.

## **Abilities**
- Green Spirit Stone: A shockwave with 2 charges.
- Blue Spirit Stone: Shields some damage and shielding damage charges other swords quicker.
- Orange Spirit Stone: A small fire riptide with 3 charges (you can also do one big riptide by combining them).
- Pink Spirit Stone: Shoots a pink beam dealing damage to entities.

### Trims
Both Engravium Ingots and all Spirit Stones can be used as a trim material.

### Skins
The Engravium Greatsword has 5 extra skins, wich are swappable by Sneak-Right-Clicking a smithing table.\
The skins include:
- Crystaline
- Morieré
- Abyss
- Moonlight
- Ink

![All Spirit Stones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dd57f3f1b527e247c7de59175b5e664d7cfe5d7.png)
